name: jdy_get_upload_token
description_zh: 获取向简道云上传文件所需的token和URL
description: Get file upload tokens and upload URLs for attaching files to form records. Returns token_and_url_list[] each with 'url' (upload endpoint) and 'token' (upload credential). Each request returns 100 tokens. Tokens and transaction_id are valid for 1 hour. The transaction_id must be the same UUID used when creating/updating the data record. Rate limit: 20/s.

transaction_id.description: 事务ID（UUID格式，自行生成，后续新建/修改数据时需传入相同值）
